headline: Trump's $2.2T proposed defense budget boosts Lockheed Martin's outlook

President Donald Trump’s proposed $2.2 trillion defense budget eases one of the biggest concerns around Lockheed Martin's forward guidance. At the same time, missile demand is building, and the company is expanding capacity to meet ...

headline: Trump Just Promised to Bomb Iran Back to the ‘Stone Age.’ These Are 2 Stocks to Buy Now

headline: Exostar Wins New 5-Year Contract with Lockheed Martin for Supplier, Risk, and Compliance Management
summary: Exostar, an Arlington Capital Partners portfolio company and the leader in trusted, compliant, and secure business collaboration software for highly regulated industries, including aerospace and defense, life sciences, and healthcare, today announced it has received a new five-year contract from Lockheed Martin to extend a contractual relationship that has spanned more than two decades.

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Lockheed Martin (LMT) After Its Strong Year To Date Run?
summary: If you are wondering whether Lockheed Martin at around US$637.90 a share is still a solid entry point or if the easier gains have already occurred, this article breaks down what that price implies about value. The stock has returned 6.6% over the last 7 days, while the 30-day return is a 5.0% decline. Longer-term returns are 28.3% year to date, 52.1% over 1 year, 39.2% over 3 years and 88.2% over 5 years. Recent coverage has focused on Lockheed Martin as a key aerospace and defense name,...

headline: Pentagon-Linked REalloys Secures U.S. Rare Earth Supply Ahead of China Ban
summary: REalloys has secured a domestic rare earth supply agreement to help build a China-free U.S. defense metals supply chain ahead of a 2027 ban on Chinese-origin materials.
